title: Eternal Feather
description: For every [blue]5[/blue] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]3[/green] HP whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Healing is calculated as (Deck cards ÷ 5) × 3, rounded down. Triggers whenever you enter any Rest Site room.
